label: 🌐 Web Development
description: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React, and frontend tools

extensions.name: Live Server
extensions.description: Launches a local dev server with live reload. Essential for HTML/CSS work.

extensions.name: ES7+ React Snippets
extensions.description: Shorthand snippets for React. Type 'rfce' and get a full component instantly.

extensions.name: Tailwind CSS IntelliSense
extensions.description: Autocomplete, hover previews, and linting for Tailwind CSS classes.

extensions.name: HTML CSS Support
extensions.description: Class and ID completion from your CSS files when writing HTML.

extensions.name: REST Client
extensions.description: Send HTTP requests directly from a .http file inside VS Code. No Postman needed.

extensions.name: TypeScript Nightly
extensions.description: Enables the latest TypeScript features before they land in the stable release.

extensions.name: IntelliSense for CSS class names
extensions.description: Autocompletes CSS class names in your HTML based on your project's stylesheets.
